title: Section 48
content: 1[48. Rights of patentees.--Subject to the other provisions contained in this Act and the conditions specified in section 47, a patent granted under this Act shall confer upon the patentee-- (a) where the subject matter of the patent is a product, the exclusive right to prevent third parties, who do not have his consent, from the act of making, using, offering for sale, selling or importing for those purposes that product in India; (b) where the subject matter of the patent is a process, the exclusive right to prevent third parties, who do not have his consent, from the act of using that process, and from the act of using, offering for sale, selling or importing for those purposes the product obtained directly by that process in India. 2* * * * *]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 2002, s. 25, for section 48 (w.e.f. 20-5-2003). 2. The proviso omitted by Act 15 of 2005, s. 36 (w.e.f. 1-1-2005).
